overall.description: A cinematic third-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit night market. The character approaches a food vendor stall, moves past the counter, then continues down a dark alleyway lined with trash, metal stairs, and glowing neon signs.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered food stall walkway with neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking along the counter of a food stall, approaching the vendor area

notable_agents.action: vendor in white apron and cap standing behind the food counter

entered.detail: yellow-roofed food stall with illuminated glass display cases showing menu items
glowing blue neon arrow sign pointing left, mounted on the wall
large rectangular panel with warm yellow grid lighting on the ceiling
counter surface covered in colorful green, yellow, and red graffiti art

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a cyberpunk night market stall with a yellow-roofed food display case. The camera moves forward along a graffiti-covered counter, passing under warm yellow grid lights and a blue neon arrow sign. A vendor in a white apron stands behind the counter as the character approaches.

events.description: character slows down while approaching the vendor counter where other customers are gathered
cybernetic character temporarily blocks view of vendor while moving at counter

agents.ego_description: approaching the food counter and moving around other customers

notable_agents.action: character with chrome cybernetic arms wearing a jacket, standing at the counter
customer in striped jacket sitting on green stool at the counter

entered.detail: tall gray metal locker with digital interface panel on the side

segments.scene_description: At the food counter, the character interacts with the environment near a vendor and two other customers, including one with prominent cybernetic arms. The camera moves past the counter, revealing a metal storage locker in the background as the initial food display case passes out of view.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark alley with metal stairs and debris

events.description: exits covered stall area into open alleyway with trash and industrial elements
lighting shifts from warm yellow to cooler tones with prominent orange neon tube

agents.ego_description: turning away from the counter and walking into the darker alleyway

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking toward the camera in the distance

entered.detail: industrial metal staircase with railings leading to upper level
long horizontal orange neon light tube mounted on the stair structure
scattered debris and trash on the ground including papers and containers

segments.scene_description: The character exits the covered stall into a darker, narrower alley with industrial metal stairs and scattered trash. An orange neon tube illuminates the stair structure as the lighting shifts to cooler tones. Pedestrians appear in the distance walking toward the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit alley with multiple food stalls

events.description: passing through a group of pedestrians in the narrow passage

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow alley past other pedestrians and food stalls

notable_agents.action: pedestrians walking past the camera in the narrow alleyway

entered.detail: food counter illuminated with green neon lighting and green bar stools
three illuminated digital menu displays hanging above the food stall
large cylindrical concrete pillar with metal bands wrapped around it
tangle of black cables and wires hanging across the alley ceiling

segments.scene_description: Walking deeper into the alley, the character passes a green-lit food stall with digital menu screens and concrete pillars wrapped in metal bands. Overhead cables crisscross the ceiling as the camera navigates through moderate pedestrian traffic in the narrow neon-lit passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a brightly lit food stall into the depths of a narrow, neon-drenched industrial alley. It begins by gliding along a graffiti-covered counter under warm yellow grid lights and a blue neon arrow, passing a vendor in a white apron. As the camera moves past the food display and a customer with cybernetic arms, the scene shifts away from the stall's warmth to reveal a metal storage locker in the background. The perspective then exits the covered area into a darker passage where the lighting turns cooler, highlighting industrial metal stairs illuminated by an orange neon tube and scattered trash. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into the alley, navigating through pedestrian traffic and passing a green-lit stall with digital menus beneath a ceiling of crisscrossing overhead cables.
